---
title: "Network Dynamics"
subtitle: "Legacy Session (Merged into Networks)"
format: html
---

The SIS materials were consolidated into **Session 5: Networks** to remove duplicated content.

Use these canonical pages instead:

[SIS Model](../networks/sis.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[SIR Model](../networks/sir.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Networks Assignment](../networks/assignment.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

Rumor-model note: the **Daley-Kendall** model is the classical Ignorant → Spreader → Stifler variant [@daley1965stochastic].

## Legacy Assignment

If you still want to use the old assignment variant, it remains available here:

[Network Dynamics Assignment](assignment.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

## What do we need?

### `networkx`

Create graphs and store node states.

### `matplotlib.pyplot`

Draw graphs and plot time series of state counts.

## References

- Session code: [amlab/networks_complex](../../amlab/networks_complex/), [amlab/networkx_data](../../amlab/networkx_data/)
- Curated references: [references](../../references/)
